'''pavozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccoughing|hiccoughing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccoughing|hiccoughing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pavozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pævezeth|pævezeth]] || [[word:pævezej|pævezej]] || [[word:pævezesh|pævezesh]] || [[word:pæveze|pæveze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavovozoth|pavovozoth]] || [[word:pavovozoj|pavovozoj]] || [[word:pavovozosh|pavovozosh]] || [[word:pavovozo|pavovozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavozoth|pavozoth]] || [[word:pavozoj|pavozoj]] || [[word:pavozosh|pavozosh]] || [[word:pavozo|pavozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavofzoth|pavofzoth]] || [[word:pavofzoj|pavofzoj]] || [[word:pavofzosh|pavofzosh]] || [[word:pavofzof|pavofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pavozotho|pavozotho]] || [[word:pavozojo|pavozojo]] || [[word:pavozosho|pavozosho]] || [[word:pavozoko|pavozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pavozoth|pavozoth]] || [[word:pavozoj|pavozoj]] || [[word:pavozosh|pavozosh]] || [[word:pavozo|pavozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pavozothol|pavozothol]] || [[word:pavozojol|pavozojol]] || [[word:pavozoshol|pavozoshol]] || [[word:pavozokol|pavozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pavozothotho|pavozothotho]] || [[word:pavozojojo|pavozojojo]] || [[word:pavozoshosho|pavozoshosho]] || [[word:pavozoko|pavozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pavozothon|pavozothon]] || [[word:pavozojon|pavozojon]] || [[word:pavozoshon|pavozoshon]] || [[word:pavozokon|pavozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pavozothoro|pavozothoro]] || [[word:pavozojoro|pavozojoro]] || [[word:pavozoshoro|pavozoshoro]] || [[word:pavozokoro|pavozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
